CREATE TABLE simple_1 (id UInt64, val SimpleAggregateFunction(sum, Double)) ENGINE=AggregatingMergeTree ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO simple_1 VALUES (1, 5.0), (2, 10.0), (3, 15.0);
SELECT id, val FROM simple_1;
CREATE TABLE simple_2 (id UInt64, val SimpleAggregateFunction(min, Int32)) ENGINE=AggregatingMergeTree ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO simple_2 VALUES (1, 2), (2, 6), (1, 4);
SELECT id, val FROM simple_2;
CREATE TABLE simple_3 (id UInt64, val SimpleAggregateFunction(max, Float64)) ENGINE=AggregatingMergeTree ORDER BY id;
SELECT id, val FROM simple_3;
CREATE TABLE combined (id UInt64, sum_val SimpleAggregateFunction(sum, Double), min_val SimpleAggregateFunction(min, Int32)) ENGINE=AggregatingMergeTree ORDER BY id;

INSERT INTO combined SELECT id, SimpleAggregateFunction(sum, Double)(val), SimpleAggregateFunction(min, Int32)(val) FROM (SELECT id, val FROM simple_1 UNION ALL SELECT id, val FROM simple_2) GROUP BY id;
SELECT id, sum_val, min_val FROM combined;
CREATE TABLE nested (id UInt64, total SimpleAggregateFunction(sum, Double)) ENGINE=AggregatingMergeTree ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO nested SELECT id, total FROM (SELECT id, SimpleAggregateFunction(sum, Double)(val) AS total FROM simple_1 GROUP BY id) AS sub;
SELECT id, total FROM nested;
CREATE TABLE multi_table (id UInt64, avg_val SimpleAggregateFunction(avg, Float64), count_val SimpleAggregateFunction(count, UInt32)) ENGINE=AggregatingMergeTree ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO multi_table SELECT s.id, avg(s.val), count(s.val) FROM simple_1 AS s JOIN simple_2 AS u ON s.id = u.id GROUP BY s.id;
SELECT id, avg_val, count_val FROM multi_table;
CREATE TABLE complex_case (id UInt64, prod_val SimpleAggregateFunction(sum, Double), unique_vals SimpleAggregateFunction(groupUniqArray, Int32)) ENGINE=AggregatingMergeTree ORDER BY id;

INSERT INTO complex_case SELECT id, SimpleAggregateFunction(sum, Double)(val), SimpleAggregateFunction(groupUniqArray, Int32)(val) FROM (SELECT id, val FROM simple_1 UNION ALL SELECT id, val FROM simple_2) GROUP BY id;
SELECT id, prod_val, unique_vals FROM complex_case;
